# dotfiles

> Cross-platform dotfiles managed by Chezmoi for macOS and Linux. Homebrew/apt is the source of truth for CLIs, with pinned upstream installers for tools that need it (gcloud, aws-cli, Snowflake Cortex). Per-language version managers handle runtimes (fnm, uv, rustup). Includes Zsh + Oh My Zsh + Powerlevel10k, Tmux with Catppuccin theme, Neovim with full LSP support, and a portable agent skills catalog plus subagents (architect, curator, debugger, guardian, ideator, strategist, technical-documentation-architect, writer) in `dot_agents/`. Skills and subagents are cross-project: installable via [agentspec](https://github.com/urmzd/agentspec) into any tool (claude-code, codex, gemini, copilot) from any project.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/README.md): Setup, dev environments, shell/terminal/editor config, automation, and the full skill catalog
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/AGENTS.md): File naming conventions, subagents, skill catalog, and commit guidelines
- [dot_agents/AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/AGENTS.md): Agent & skill registry layout (`~/.agents/`), cross-project usage

## API / Key Files

- [Brewfile.tmpl](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/Brewfile.tmpl): macOS Homebrew packages (source of truth for CLIs; selection driven by `package_preset` + `install_cloud`/`install_fonts`/`install_mobile` group flags and `pkg_exclude`)
- [run_onchange_after_install-cortex.sh.tmpl](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/run_onchange_after_install-cortex.sh.tmpl): Snowflake Cortex Code CLI installer (pinned upstream)
- [run_onchange_after_install-cloud-clis.sh.tmpl](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/run_onchange_after_install-cloud-clis.sh.tmpl): gcloud + aws-cli installers (pinned upstream)
- [dot_config/](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_config/): Neovim, Ghostty, Tmux, and other tool configs
- [dot_zshrc.tmpl](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_zshrc.tmpl): Zsh configuration template
- [dot_agents/skills/](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/): Portable AI agent skills directory
- [dot_agents/agents/](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/agents/): Subagent definitions
- [dot_codex/](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_codex/): Codex CLI config (workspace-write "Auto" base + writer/reviewer/plan/guardian profiles and `/agent` subagents)
- [dot_gemini/settings.json](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_gemini/settings.json): Legacy Gemini CLI settings, kept as Antigravity CLI (agy) first-run migration seed
- [dot_copilot/settings.json](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_copilot/settings.json): GitHub Copilot CLI config (model, effort, theme)

## Agents

- [architect](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/agents/architect.md): Interface-first systems design with verbose, principle-driven reasoning
- [curator](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/agents/curator.md): Prescriptive perfectionist focused on consistency, polish, and visual hierarchy
- [debugger](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/agents/debugger.md): Terse, empirical root-cause analysis with evidence before conclusions
- [guardian](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/agents/guardian.md): Supervises orchestrated agent fleets driven by the `orchestrate-agents` skill; also ships as a Codex profile
- [ideator](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/agents/ideator.md): Expansive, generative creative exploration before constraints
- [strategist](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/agents/strategist.md): Imperative orchestration across multiple systems with batch operations
- [technical-documentation-architect](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/agents/technical-documentation-architect.md): Elite documentation specialist with validation-first structure
- [writer](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/agents/writer.md): Concise, outcome-focused technical documentation for human + AI audiences

## Skills

- [agent-design-doctrine](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/agent-design-doctrine/SKILL.md): House doctrine for LLM agent systems (safety in the harness, tools return results, deterministic evals, POC scope discipline)
- [assess-quality](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/assess-quality/SKILL.md): Foundational quality framework (the "why" layer above review-design and write-code)
- [audit-security](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/audit-security/SKILL.md): Security auditing and threat detection
- [build-cli](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/build-cli/SKILL.md): Design and audit CLI tools end-to-end (output modes, TTY, JSON, install.sh, portfolio self-update / `--format` requirements)
- [check-project](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/check-project/SKILL.md): Validate project structure against scaffold conventions
- [choose-stack](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/choose-stack/SKILL.md): Tech stack selection by purpose
- [community-health](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/community-health/SKILL.md): Scaffold GitHub Community Standards files using `$COMMUNITY_HEALTH_CONTACT` or `git config user.email`
- [configure-ai](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/configure-ai/SKILL.md): AI tooling configuration, AGENTS.md, skills standard
- [create-llms-txt](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/create-llms-txt/SKILL.md): Generate llms.txt files
- [create-oss-skill](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/create-oss-skill/SKILL.md): Agent skill scaffolding and authoring (canonical spec)
- [diagnose-ci](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/diagnose-ci/SKILL.md): Find failing remote CI pipelines, pull logs, identify root cause
- [diagnose-runtime](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/diagnose-runtime/SKILL.md): Triage local runtime errors, hangs, slowness, and hardware/serial issues (local counterpart to diagnose-ci)
- [extend-oss-skills-to-claude](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/extend-oss-skills-to-claude/SKILL.md): Claude-specific deltas on top of create-oss-skill (prerequisite)
- [fix-and-retry](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/fix-and-retry/SKILL.md): Diagnose CI failure, apply fix, commit, push, re-run
- [manage-detect-secrets](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/manage-detect-secrets/SKILL.md): detect-secrets baseline mechanics (update flags, commit-loop break, allowlist pragmas, audit flow)
- [manage-secrets](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/manage-secrets/SKILL.md): 1Password-based secret workflow (vault layout, `1p://` references, `op run`)
- [orchestrate-agents](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/orchestrate-agents/SKILL.md): Survey-first orchestration of agent CLIs (Claude, Codex, Antigravity) over tmux: adopt and extend existing sessions, spawn only what is missing. Pairs with the `guardian` subagent
- [pr](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/pr/SKILL.md): Create PRs with auto-generated summary
- [release-audit](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/release-audit/SKILL.md): Audit releases, tags, and assets for health
- [repo-init](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/repo-init/SKILL.md): Full repo bootstrap (create, license, scaffold, push)
- [repo-status](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/repo-status/SKILL.md): Scan a folder of git repos and report activity, branch divergence, and uncommitted state (renamed from `status`)
- [review-design](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/review-design/SKILL.md): Pragmatic Programmer principles (DRY, orthogonality, design by contract)
- [review-diff](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/review-diff/SKILL.md): Review current staged/unstaged/untracked changes against a five-dimension rubric (prioritized findings)
- [run-eval-harness](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/run-eval-harness/SKILL.md): Run a project's eval suite end to end (launch, monitor, parse report, diff vs previous run; forks to a sonnet subagent)
- [scaffold-go](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/scaffold-go/SKILL.md): Go deltas on top of scaffold-project
- [scaffold-node](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/scaffold-node/SKILL.md): Node/TypeScript deltas on top of scaffold-project
- [scaffold-project](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/scaffold-project/SKILL.md): Project scaffolding conventions and standard files (canonical)
- [scaffold-python](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/scaffold-python/SKILL.md): Python deltas on top of scaffold-project
- [scaffold-rust](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/scaffold-rust/SKILL.md): Rust deltas on top of scaffold-project
- [scaffold-terraform](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/scaffold-terraform/SKILL.md): Terraform deltas on top of scaffold-project
- [setup-ci](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/setup-ci/SKILL.md): CI/CD pipeline setup and workflow conventions
- [setup-devenv](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/setup-devenv/SKILL.md): Per-language version manager + direnv pattern (portable)
- [setup-devenv-with-chezmoi](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/setup-devenv-with-chezmoi/SKILL.md): Chezmoi helpers for pinned installers and tracked `.envrc` templates
- [ship](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/ship/SKILL.md): Generate a conventional commit, then optionally push and watch CI until pass/fail
- [style-brand](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/style-brand/SKILL.md): Frame a project's visual identity. Ships Cyberdream + MonaspiceNe + teasr as a template, not a mandate
- [sync-docs](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/sync-docs/SKILL.md): Audit and synchronize project documentation (canonical doc-drift skill)
- [sync-ecosystem](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/sync-ecosystem/SKILL.md): Audit one repository against ecosystem conventions and emit a drift report (portable)
- [sync-ecosystem-to-chezmoi](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/sync-ecosystem-to-chezmoi/SKILL.md): Apply a sync-ecosystem drift report back into the chezmoi source tree
- [sync-release](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/sync-release/SKILL.md): Release pipeline setup (sr.yaml v7)
- [test-code](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/test-code/SKILL.md): Testing philosophy and per-language conventions
- [triage-dotfiles-env](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/triage-dotfiles-env/SKILL.md): Playbook of known dotfiles-stack failure modes (pipx shims, gpg signing, nix shellHook, P10k, nvim Lua APIs)
- [update-repo-meta](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/update-repo-meta/SKILL.md): Update GitHub repo topics, description, homepage
- [write-code](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/write-code/SKILL.md): Operational tech-stack picks and coding patterns (portable)
- [write-code-portfolio](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/write-code-portfolio/SKILL.md): Personal portfolio specifics (Nix Flakes, chezmoi machine polymorphism, Powerlevel10k, Neovim)
- [write-readme](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/dot_agents/skills/write-readme/SKILL.md): README standards

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/dotfiles/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute (including how to add new skills and subagents)
